en_title: id Software Creative Director Says Claims the Doom Developer Was 'Nerfed Into the Ground' by Xbox Layoffs Are Untrue
cn_title: id Software创意总监否认XBOX裁员已将工作室「彻底削弱」
subtitle: 《毁灭战士》团队仍在
opus_summary: id Software创意总监Hugo Martin否认XBOX裁员已将工作室「彻底削弱」，称团队规模与开发2016年《毁灭战士》时相当，id Tech仍在运作，并会在获批后公开下一部作品。

paragraphs.en: id Software creative director Hugo Martin has commented on the Xbox layoffs that have affected the legendary Doom developer, insisting it’s still alive and kicking.
paragraphs.cn: id Software创意总监Hugo Martin谈到了波及这家传奇《毁灭战士》开发商的XBOX裁员，并坚称工作室依然运转良好。

paragraphs.en: A WARN notice filed in Texas last week and reported by Game Developer confirmed that 96 workers had been laid off in Richardson, Texas, home of id Software, with a further 40 remote roles cut. The cuts, estimated to have affected half the id Software staff, were part of new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma’s “reset” of Microsoft’s gaming business, which began with 1,600 staff losing their jobs. Another 1,600 will be let go during the rest of the current financial year. Four Xbox studios are already out the door, with another hot on their heels.
paragraphs.cn: Game Developer报道，上周在得克萨斯州提交的一份《工人调整和再培训通知法案》（WARN）通知证实，id Software所在地得州理查森有96名员工被裁，另有40个远程岗位遭到削减。据估计，此次裁员波及id Software半数员工，是XBOX新任CEO Asha Sharma「重置」微软游戏业务的一部分。该计划首先裁掉1,600人，本财年剩余时间还将再裁1,600人。已有四家XBOX工作室遭到关闭，另一家也紧随其后。

paragraphs.en: Last week, id Software issued a statement responding to the layoffs , saying it was now at the staffing level it had back when it made the much-loved 2016 Doom reboot. It also insisted it was still capable of making “great games,” and pushed back on the suggestion that there’s essentially no-one left at the company working on id Tech, the game engine it and fellow Bethesda-owned studio MachineGames uses to build their games. Xbox confirmed to IGN that "there are dozens of people working on id Tech across multiple locations," and that previous reports that there was only one person left in Texas are "inaccurate."
paragraphs.cn: id Software上周发表声明回应裁员，称目前的人员规模与制作广受喜爱的2016年《毁灭战士》重启作时相当。工作室还坚称自己仍有能力打造「出色的游戏」，并驳斥了公司几乎已无人维护id Tech的说法。id Tech是id Software及同属贝塞斯达的MachineGames用于开发游戏的引擎。XBOX向IGN证实，「多个地点共有数十人在参与id Tech开发」，此前所谓得州只剩一人的报道「并不准确」。

paragraphs.en: First reported by Kotaku , during a livestream playthrough of Doom: The Dark Ages DLC , Revelations, Martin addressed the layoffs, pushing back against reports of the studio’s demise and promising to announce what it’s working on next in due time.
paragraphs.cn: 据Kotaku率先报道，Martin在直播游玩《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》DLC「Revelations」时谈及裁员，反驳了工作室已经垮掉的报道，并承诺会在适当时机公布团队接下来开发的项目。

paragraphs.en: “There’s been reports that we’ve been ‘nerfed into the ground’ and ‘gutted’ and we have 50 people, and that’s not true,” Martin said. “We’re the size we were when we made Doom 2016, and id Tech is very much alive and well. You have to understand, we have id Tech engineers both in Frankfurt and at MachineGames. We collaborate quite a bit. The id Tech is there, the Doom team is here, and we’re excited to share with you guys more of what we’re working on in the future when it is appropriate and approved.”
paragraphs.cn: Martin说：「有报道称我们已经被‘彻底削弱’、‘掏空’，只剩50个人，但这不是真的。我们现在的规模与制作2016年《毁灭战士》时相当，id Tech也依然运作良好。大家要明白，我们在法兰克福和MachineGames都有id Tech工程师，彼此经常合作。id Tech还在，《毁灭战士》团队也还在。等到时机合适并获得批准后，我们很期待向大家分享更多未来项目的信息。」

paragraphs.en: Martin then suggested Doom: The Dark Ages , the prequel to 2016's Doom and 2020's Doom Eternal , was meeting commercial expectations.
paragraphs.cn: Martin随后表示，作为2016年《毁灭战士》和2020年《毁灭战士：永恒》前传的《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》，商业表现符合预期。

paragraphs.en: “Look, the fact that we made a game that people like and is critical and commercially successful — like I said, it’s doing very well related to the forecast and stuff — that’s good for everyone, for the people at the studio, for the people who unfortunately we had to say goodbye to. I think that helps everyone and we really appreciate your support,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「听着，我们做出了一款玩家喜欢、口碑和商业表现都很成功的游戏——正如我所说，相较预测，它的表现非常好——这对所有人都有好处，包括工作室里的员工，也包括那些我们不幸不得不告别的同事。我认为这能帮助每个人，我们也非常感谢大家的支持。」

paragraphs.en: “But what matters the most is that the games are good, and I’m so happy that people, I don’t know… It’s just a good thing for everybody, and I know it’s going to help.”
paragraphs.cn: 「但最重要的是游戏本身要好。我非常高兴大家……我也不知道该怎么说。这对所有人都是一件好事，我知道它会带来帮助。」

paragraphs.en: Martin's comments come as laid off staff protest outside Bethesda offices, including id Software's. According to Kera News , dozens of workers attended a “Save our Devs” rally outside id Software's Richardson office building on Wednesday, as part of an event organized in several cities across the country and Canada by workers represented by the Communications Workers of America union. The CWA is currently negotiating an exit agreement with Microsoft.
paragraphs.cn: Martin发表上述言论之际，被裁员工正在Bethesda旗下多间办公室外抗议，其中包括id Software。据Kera News报道，数十名员工周三在id Software位于理查森的办公楼外参加了「拯救我们的开发者」集会。这是由美国通信工人协会（CWA）代表的员工在美国及加拿大多个城市组织的活动之一。CWA目前正与微软谈判离职协议。

paragraphs.en: id Software co-founders John Romero and John Carmack have both issued statements on the layoffs at the studio. John Romero took to social media to offer affected id Software staff his support , and to call on the studio’s recent legacy to be preserved. “Doom, Quake, and Wolfenstein are not easy names to carry on, especially in today’s industry,” he said. “The last few games showed real care, skill and respect for what those worlds mean to people.”
paragraphs.cn: id Software联合创始人John Romero和John Carmack都已就工作室裁员发表声明。John Romero在社交媒体上声援受影响的id Software员工，并呼吁保住工作室近年来建立的传承。他说：「《毁灭战士》《雷神之锤》和《德军总部》都不是容易延续的名号，尤其是在当今行业环境下。最近几部作品体现了真正的用心、技术，以及对这些世界在人们心中意义的尊重。」

paragraphs.en: Carmack, however, expressed sadness but not “anger or outrage," questioning whether id Software's games had sold well enough to prevent the layoffs .
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Carmack表达的是悲伤，而非「愤怒或震怒」。他质疑id Software游戏的销量是否足以避免此次裁员。

paragraphs.en: So, what will id Software make next? According to GamesBeat , id Software was formulating new game ideas, such as a John Wick-style original IP, a new Perfect Dark game, and a multiplayer / co-op Doom game before the layoffs hit. The Verge’s Tom Warren has said id Software is now working on a new Doom game.
paragraphs.cn: 那么id Software接下来会开发什么？据GamesBeat报道，裁员发生前，id Software正在构思多个新游戏方案，包括一个《疾速追杀》风格的原创IP、一款新的《完美黑暗》游戏，以及支持多人或合作游玩的《毁灭战士》游戏。The Verge的Tom Warren则称，id Software目前正在开发一款新的《毁灭战士》游戏。
